allow: PowerShell($vswhere = "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\Installer\\vswhere.exe"; Write-Output "=== Installed products ==="; & $vswhere -prerelease -all -format json | ConvertFrom-Json | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "DisplayName: $\($_.displayName\)"; Write-Output "ProductId: $\($_.productId\)"; Write-Output "InstallationVersion: $\($_.installationVersion\)"; Write-Output "InstallationPath: $\($_.installationPath\)"; Write-Output "" }; Write-Output "=== Workloads installed ==="; & $vswhere -prerelease -all -format value -property packages | Select-String -Pattern "Workload|VCTools|VC\\.Tools|MSVC|CMake" | Select-Object -First 30)

PowerShell($vswhere = "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\Installer\\vswhere.exe"; Write-Output "=== ALL packages installed \(full list\) ==="; & $vswhere -prerelease -all -format value -property packages)
